title: Plea before P&H High Court seeks ₹1 crore compensation for family of teacher who died in school roof collapse
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court on Thursday sought the Punjab government’s response to a plea seeking enforcement of a State minister’s assurance of ₹1 crore compensation to the family of a teacher who died in a Ludhiana school roof collapse [Uday Pratap Singh and Another v State of Punjab and Others]The counsel representing the victim's son and husband submitted that the compensation amount was announced by Education Minister Harjot Singh Bains in 2024 but only ₹22 lakh has been paid so far.
